sector_summary: The sectors with medium confidence include Technology, Financials, Energy, Healthcare, Materials, and Communication Services, though several of these show conflicts between price momentum and news flow. Defensive sectors like Clean Energy and Aerospace & Defence are gaining attention, aligning with the current risk-off macro regime.
